{ "name": "sebastian/object-enumerator", "description": "Traverses array structures and object graphs to enumerate all referenced objects", "homepage": "https://github.com/sebastianbergmann/object-enumerator/", "license": "BSD-3-Clause", "authors": [ { "name": "Sebastian Bergmann", "email": "sebastian@phpunit.de" } ], "support": { "issues": "https://github.com/sebastianbergmann/object-enumerator/issues", "security": "https://github.com/sebastianbergmann/object-enumerator/security/policy" }, "prefer-stable": true, "config": { "platform": { "php": "8.2.0" }, "optimize-autoloader": true, "sort-packages": true }, "require": { "php": ">=8.2", "sebastian/object-reflector": "^4.0", "sebastian/recursion-context": "^6.0" }, "require-dev": { "phpunit/phpunit": "^11.0" }, "autoload": { "classmap": [ "src/" ] }, "autoload-dev": { "classmap": [ "tests/_fixture/" ] }, "extra": { "branch-alias": { "dev-main": "6.0-dev" } } }
